headline: ADP National Employment Report Preliminary Estimate for March 28, 2026
summary: For the four weeks ending March 28, 2026, U.S. private employers added an average of 39,250 jobs per week, according to the NER Pulse, a weekly update of the monthly ADP National Employment Report (NER).

headline: The Hidden Winners Inside SCHD - April 2026 Breakdown
summary: Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF (SCHD) has outperformed in 2026, up over 11% YTD versus a flat SPY.
